<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type t =
      Android
    | IPhone
    | IPad
    | IPod
    | IWatch
    | BlackBerry
    | Windows
    | Unknown
  val t_of_string : string -> Platform.t
  val string_of_t : Platform.t -> string
  val get : unit -> Platform.t
  val css_class : Platform.t -> string
end >>
